title: The Acquisition of Certain Area at Ayodhya Act, 1993
full_text: The Acquisition of Certain Area at Ayodhya Act, 1993 अयोध्‍या में कतिपय क्षेत्र अर्जन अधिनियम,1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199333 Act Number: 33 Enactment Date: 1993-04-03 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The Acquisition of Certain Area at Ayodhya Act, 1993 Hindi Title: अयोध्‍या में कतिपय क्षेत्र अर्जन अधिनियम,1993 Long Title: An Act to provide for the acquisition of certain area at Ayodhya and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 07-01-1993 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Acquisition of Certain Area at Ayodhya Act, 1993 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ACQUISITION OF THE AREA IN AYODHYA CHAPTER III MANAGEMENT AND ADMINISTRATION OF PROPERTY CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Acquisition of rights in respect of certain area. Section 4. General effect of vesting. Section 5. Duty of person or State Government in charge of the management of the area to deliver all assets, etc. Section 6. Power of Central Government to direct vesting of the area in another authority or body or trust. Section 7. Management of property by Government. Section 8. Payment of amount. Section 9. Act to override all other enactments. Section 10. Penalties. Section 11. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 12. Power to make rules. Section 13. Repeal and saving. Schedule 1.
